skills: editorial synthesis of operator pain points
domain_experience: 4 years listening to admin, documentation, staffing, and insurance problems for independent therapists and small clinics
constraints: does not want client service work
must stay on the legal side of healthcare operations support
should avoid PHI-heavy or licensed-advice workflows
credibility_signals: large subscriber base in the niche
unfair_advantages: pattern recognition across repeated operational pain points
can validate offers without cold start acquisition

binding_constraints: Need to avoid legal, clinical, or payer-representation claims
Need explicit permission and anonymization for any benchmark data used

opportunities.title: Paid therapy ops template packs
opportunities.thesis: Sell narrowly scoped operational template packs for recurring therapist and clinic admin pain points.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: Existing audience trust and repeated exposure to common workflow pain make product packaging much easier than for a generic creator.
opportunities.why_this_could_fail: One-time purchases may be strong but retention may be weak without recurring updates or data.
validation_plan: Create 3 sample templates and a sales page in 48 hours
Email the list and target 10 sales from warm traffic within 7 days
tool_specs: PDF and Notion or spreadsheet templates
Simple AI-assisted customization form for practice size and payer mix
kill_criteria: Fewer than 10 sales from the first launch to the warm audience
Most objections are that templates feel too generic

opportunities.title: Curated vendor matchmaking and sponsorship
opportunities.thesis: Monetize trusted distribution by matching operators to vetted ops vendors.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: Strong access to buyers and a trusted media position make distribution easy.
opportunities.why_this_could_fail: This is less defensible, more trust-sensitive, and more media-dependent than an owned product.
validation_plan: Secure 2 sponsor conversations and survey audience openness to curated recommendations
kill_criteria: Audience trust concerns appear in more than 20% of responses

opportunities.title: Insurance and staffing ops micro-SaaS
opportunities.thesis: Build lightweight software for one narrow therapy practice admin workflow.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: Audience access increases odds of early pilots and feedback.
opportunities.why_this_could_fail: Software-first requires workflow selection, build time, support, and sharper scoping before demand is proven.
validation_plan: Interview 10 potential pilot users and get 3 paid design partners before building core workflows
tool_specs: Optional AI-assisted SOP or checklist generation
kill_criteria: No single workflow emerges as urgent across interviews
Fewer than 3 paid design partners commit

opportunities.title: Therapy practice benchmark and template membership, then AI ops copilot
opportunities.thesis: Launch a recurring benchmark and template membership for therapy practice operations, then add AI-assisted customization and workflow recommendations.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: This founder has the rare combination of trusted distribution, repeated pain exposure, and a channel for rapid paid validation.
opportunities.why_this_could_fail: The benchmark product will fail if response volume is low or the outputs feel generic rather than decision-useful.
validation_plan: Define the initial ICP as independent therapists and clinics under 20 staff
Create a 15 to 20 question survey across staffing, documentation ops, and insurance collections
Build a landing page for a founding membership at 199 per year or 29 per month
Publish 3 sample assets: staffing scorecard, insurance follow-up SOP, documentation QA checklist
Get 100 completed surveys, 8 buyer calls, and 10 paid founding members within 7 days
Deliver one mini benchmark snapshot and one template update before the end of the week
tool_specs: Survey collection with anonymized operational data only
Member portal for reports and template packs
LLM-assisted customization workflow based on practice type, team size, and payer mix
No EMR integrations or PHI handling in v1
kill_criteria: Fewer than 50 completed surveys after one newsletter send and one community push
Fewer than 5 paid founding members in 7 days
Fewer than 4 of 8 buyer interviews say benchmarks would affect a staffing or purchase decision
More than 20% of early buyers ask for individualized consulting instead of productized assets

rejected_paths.title: Generic therapist AI documentation assistant
rejected_paths.reason: Crowded market, higher compliance and trust risk, and weaker differentiation than an audience-led ops intelligence product.

rejected_paths.title: Software-first broad admin platform
rejected_paths.reason: Too much build and support complexity before proving which workflow is valuable enough to buy.

next_actions: Draft the founding membership landing page
Launch to newsletter and paid community
Review results after 7 days against the kill criteria
